name: projectapp-codex
description: ProjectApp Codex automation bundle with migrated methodology, testing, deploy, and git workflows.

interface.shortDescription: ProjectApp workflows, rules, and automation for Codex
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin that ports the existing Claude/Windsurf methodology, testing, E2E, debug, deploy, and git workflows used by ProjectApp.
defaultPrompt: Use $plan to design a change before coding.
Use $implement to build and validate the requested change.
Use $debug for read-only diagnosis of errors.
